intro: Financial services and government entities were the primary targets in a wave of 51 phishing incidents tracked between April 8 and April 27, 2026. The campaigns involved threat actors FakeWallet, Lazarus Group, and LockBit, and exploited vulnerabilities including CVE-2023-22515, CVE-2023-34048, CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2023-4966, and CVE-2024-21893. The attacks affected regions globally, with notable impact in Latin America, Canada, the Caribbean, and the United States. Of the reported incidents, 43 were rated high severity and 8 medium.
